option.name: originalContent
option.value:
from langchain_openai import OpenAI from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
#select gpt model llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4")
# Or use other models: # llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4") # llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4-turbo-preview") # llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4o")
result= llm.invoke("what is the capital of India")
print(result)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
from langchain_openai import OpenAI from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv()
#select gpt model llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-3.5-turbo")
# Or use other models: # llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4") # llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4-turbo-preview") # llm = OpenAI(model="gpt-4o")
result= llm.invoke("what is the capital of India")
print(result)
